name: agent-guards
description: Runnable skills that return an exit code you can enforce — token budget audits, hallucination triage, cross-surface open-loop tracking, and a personal subscription auditor that finds recurring charges in a bank/card CSV.

interface.shortDescription: Exit-code skills: token, hallucination, open-loop, and subscription audits
interface.longDescription: Runnable skills for people running real AI agents — and their own budget. context-budget audits an agent's per-turn context window like a cost center and fails CI when the always-loaded context grows. claim-audit separates grounded, hedged, and bare factual claims so you catch the unverified assertions most likely to be hallucinations. open-loops extracts unresolved commitments, deferrals, and open questions from a transcript so cron jobs and triggers don't lose thread context. subscription-audit finds the recurring charges hiding in a bank/card CSV, reports the true monthly and yearly cost, and flags the forgotten ones worth cancelling. Dependency-light Python, exit-code gates — not prompt wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Which claims in this answer are unsupported?
Find open loops in this conversation
Which subscriptions am I paying for on repeat?
